description: IEEE 33-Bus Observed Measurements — Day: 96-step (15-min) observed sensor readings from the measurements bucket (scenario realistic_sparse | well_observed, experiment=day). Panels: observed bus voltages with true state overlay, observed power injections by class, per-class measurement counts (stat), and observed-vs-pseudo footprint by location. This layer is ADDITIVE — existing state/fault_event buckets and dashboards are untouched.

panels.description: Observed bus voltage magnitudes (pu) from the measurements bucket (class=scada, pmu — quantity=vm_pu). Target A = measured values (noisy sensor readings). Target B = true ground-truth state series from the state bucket (overlay for visual calibration). The gap between the two series shows the noise level. Realistic_sparse: 1 SCADA (bus 0) + 3 PMU (buses 17, 24, 30). Bus 17 is a μPMU candidate that goes dark during fault isolation.

targets.query:
from(bucket: "measurements")
  |> range(start: 2017-06-07T00:00:00Z, stop: 2017-06-07T23:59:59Z)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "meas")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "value")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.quantity == "vm_pu")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.experiment == "day")
  |> sort(columns: ["_time"])

from(bucket: "state")
  |> range(start: 2017-06-07T00:00:00Z, stop: 2017-06-07T23:59:59Z)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "bus")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "vm_pu")
  |> sort(columns: ["_time"])

panels.title: Observed Bus Voltages (pu) — Measured vs True Overlay

panels.description: Observed active power injections (p_inj_mw) from the measurements bucket — all classes that emit P_inj (scada, ami, pseudo). Shows the spread of power injection measurements across the 96-step day. The pseudo class (large σ=30% of P) appears with wide variability vs the SCADA/AMI readings.

targets.query:
from(bucket: "measurements")
  |> range(start: 2017-06-07T00:00:00Z, stop: 2017-06-07T23:59:59Z)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "meas")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "value")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.quantity == "p_inj_mw")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.experiment == "day")
  |> sort(columns: ["_time"])

panels.title: Observed Power Injections — P_inj_mw (all classes)

panels.description: Total measurement count per class across the full day run. Shows the relative contribution of each sensor class (scada/pmu/ami/der/pseudo) to the measurement set. In realistic_sparse: pseudo dominates (under-observable without pseudo). In well_observed: real-sensor count exceeds 2*(N-1)=64 states without pseudo.

  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "value")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.experiment == "day")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.class == "scada")
  |> count()

panels.title: Per-Class Measurement Count — Day

panels.description: Observed-vs-pseudo footprint: timeseries of measurement counts per location (bus id) coloured by class. Buses with only pseudo measurements are under-observed (realistic_sparse). Buses with scada/pmu/ami/der are real-sensor covered. This panel visualises the observability gap — which buses are dark to the real sensor network and rely on load-forecast pseudo-measurements.

targets.query:
from(bucket: "measurements")
  |> range(start: 2017-06-07T00:00:00Z, stop: 2017-06-07T23:59:59Z)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "meas")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "value")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.experiment == "day")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.class != "pseudo")
  |> group(columns: ["location", "class"])
  |> count()
  |> group()

from(bucket: "measurements")
  |> range(start: 2017-06-07T00:00:00Z, stop: 2017-06-07T23:59:59Z)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "meas")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "value")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.experiment == "day")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.class == "pseudo")
  |> group(columns: ["location"])
  |> count()
  |> group()

panels.title: Observed-vs-Pseudo Footprint by Bus Location
